testcase.name: test_assistant_happy_path_add_midi_and_tempo

failure.message: AssertionError: fallback should add a MIDI track. actions=[] assert 'add_track' in []

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_ai_endpoints.py:46: in test_assistant_happy_path_add_midi_and_tempo assert "add_track" in types, f"fallback should add a MIDI track. actions={data['actions']}" E AssertionError: fallback should add a MIDI track. actions=[] E assert 'add_track' in []
